ddls:
CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement channel */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advertisement campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advertisement campaign */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement budget */,
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertisement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertisement was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertisement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES advertisement_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_audience_id FOREIGN KEY ("audience_id") REFERENCES audiences ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the advertisement channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertisement channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertisement channel was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "audience_name" TEXT /* Name of the audience */,
  "audience_description" TEXT /* Description of the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement associated with the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "budget_description" TEXT /* Description of the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement associated with the offer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the offer */,
  "offer_amount" REAL /* Amount of the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the offer expires */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_advertisement_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertisement_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("advertisement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES offer_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the offer status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offer status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement associated with the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the advertisement */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_interactions_advertisement_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertisement_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("advertisement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "gateway_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer associated with the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer redeemed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who redeemed the offer */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was redeemed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the redemption was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the redemption was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_redemptions_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_redemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "advertisement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertisement associated with the analytics */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the advertisement */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions on the advertisement */,
  "redemptions" INTEGER /* Number of redemptions on the advertisement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_advertisement_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertisement_id") REFERENCES advertisements ("advertisement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
